data.name: Haunting Havens
data.detailed_description:
As a professional ghost hunter, you are contracted with subduing a group of trouble-causing succubi. You weren't the best option, but you were the only one left for the boss to call. As all other hunters and exorcists have failed their mission and felled to the seduction antics of the succubi.

To not get fired, ensure you are able to subdue and bone all succubi haunting the mansion without getting caught.

Haunting Havens offers two ways to risk your dignity and sanity: Arcade Mode and Story Mode (coming soon).

In Arcade Mode, due to some unfortunate budget cuts (thanks, boss), you’ll need to earn money each night to buy the necessary tools to subdue a bunch of dangerously hot ghosts. You’re stuck in this haunted hellhole until 4:00 A.M., and if your sanity drops too low, the succubi will make their move. And let’s just say… they don’t take "no" for an answer.

Get caught? Prepare for some very hands-on consequences. But if you’re the type to plan ahead, certain shop purchases and, let’s call them creative decisions, can unlock extra encounters. You know, for "science."

Story Mode will take you on a full-blown adventure, where you’ll travel through different haunted locations, meet new supernatural species, and subdue even more rogue succubi. Along the way, you’ll uncover the dark secrets of their origins, while also finding yourself in way too many compromising situations. Eventually, you’ll face the Succubus Queen herself—and whether you conquer her or surrender to her, is entirely up to you.

So, are you brave enough to fight back? Or will you end up as just another toy for the succubi’s pleasure?

Your final mission? Face the Succubus Queen—the one behind every sultry spirit you’ve encountered. She knows you’re coming, and trust me, she’s been waiting.

Will you outsmart her and break her to stop the cycle of hauntings? Or will you end up on your knees in ways you didn’t quite expect?

That’s for you to find out. Just try to keep your sanity intact—because once you lose it, you’re hers.

data.short_description: As a professional ghost hunter, you are contracted with subduing a group of troublesome succubi. You weren't the best option, but you were the only one left for the boss to call. As all other hunters and exorcists have failed their mission and felled to the seduction antics of the succubi.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: Quad-core Intel / AMD 2.5 GHz or superior
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 1060 / AMD R9 290
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 / AMD Ryzen 5 or superior
  • 記憶體: 12 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2060
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7+
  • Processor: Quad-core Intel / AMD 2.5 GHz or superior
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GTX 1060 / AMD R9 290
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7+
  • Processor: Intel Core i5 / AMD Ryzen 5 or superior
  • Memory: 12 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2060
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 8 GB available space
